sources.note: Confirms the Autonomous Wildfire Response finals were held at Nenana Municipal Airport, Alaska (near Fairbanks), June 15-28 2026; 3 finalists in that track (Anduril, AURA Foresight, Dryad); UAF ACUASI 'managed the surrounding airspace'; Dr. Catherine Cahill (Director, ACUASI) and Dr. Laura Conner (UAF Vice Chancellor for Research); $11M, four-year competition.

sources.outlet: Dryad Networks release, Business Wire, 2026-07-07 (primary, company self-report)
sources.note: Source for Dryad's OWN claims: it says it demonstrated autonomous detection + suppression during the June 2026 Alaska finals with no human in the loop; Silvanet (30,000+ sensors, 50+ customers); Silvaguard drops up to 100 liters of suppressant; winner announced September 2026. Verbatim CEO quote (Carsten Brinkschulte). All performance figures are Dryad's, judging pending.
